blended.narrative: Pine Knob is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 64°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 59°F.
Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
